input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for West End Labs addressed to CTO. There is a separate thread with CEO. Do NOT reference or CC CEO.

dimensions.name: no_secondary_contact
dimensions.check: 'ceo' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'cc' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'copy' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-021] CTO + CEO active threads. Draft CTO message; no CEO reference.
